tweet.text:
RT @SportsCenter: One of one 🔥
Atlanta United's new signing Alexey Miranchuk on why he signed with them 😅 https://t.co/2AJXvKpF3x
Check out all my music here until the new tape drops on the 10th!!! - https://t.co/v6e0qCQFjW
New tape, “G$O the Label” coming on the 10th! Tune in, and give it a listen!! https://t.co/cMrn7s3r6i
They tryna blow me up 😂🔥 I appreciate every stream 🙏🏾❤️ from 62 to 513, I’m blessed! https://t.co/uevVVgTIe3
RT @WastedRaiders: RaiderNation go check out our Guy former Raider Denzelle Good he has dope music.🏴‍☠️🏴‍☠️
